notes: v346 — EXPORT BUTTON IS NOW IN BOTH SIMPLE AND ADVANCED. The ⬆ Export data button on the main toolbar (added in v345) already worked in both views once a list was open, but Simple view now also has its own ⬆ Export / back up my data button right on the home screen, under the report cards — so you can back up or move this device's saved data in one tap without opening a list first. Advanced has it on the toolbar; Simple has it on the home screen (and on the toolbar too, once you open a list). Both save the file to your Downloads on a computer. Tip: if an export ever comes out empty, load/refresh the market first (⚡) so there's data to export. Hard-refresh to load v346. ALSO RECENT — v344 — ORDERS PLACED BEFORE THE MARKET OPENS NOW COUNT FOR TODAY. If you queue a buy before the ASX opens (before 10:00am Sydney) — say at 6am — it's treated as working from the opening bell, so if the share hits your price point today it fills today and shows in tonight's results. Orders placed during or after the session still start next trading day. Applies to 🎯 picks, manual limit buys, queued market buys, and the auto-pilot. v343 — Top 20 is a single-column ladder. v342 — fixed the table's colour seam. v341 — upgraded RSI to Wilder's standard. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
